ordering_invariant: Every code is a STRUCTURAL failure returned BEFORE any semantic or policy evaluation. Fail-closed by construction (CTEF v0.3.1 §ordering).
canonicalization: RFC 8785 (JCS) for structured fields; RFC 9530 for wire bytes

wire.triggers_on: RFC 9421 Signature-Input line malformed or missing a required component (@method, @path, content-digest, created, nonce, keyid).
Recomputed canonical bytes differ from the signed bytes (JCS RFC 8785 for structured fields, or RFC 9530 content-digest for wire bytes).
RFC 9530 content-digest does not match the received wire body.
Nonce outside the freshness window (RECOMMENDED ≤300s) or replayed within it. Deterministic nonces (hash(created+keyid)) are prohibited.

identity.triggers_on: Subject or issuer DID cannot be resolved by its method's rule (including resolve-at-time for ledger-anchored methods).
Issuer JWKS endpoint unreachable during verification.
The kid referenced by verificationMethod is not present in the resolved JWKS at the relevant (resolve-at-time) point.
verificationMethod key does not bind to the claimed identity (claim_type=identity composition failure).

authority.triggers_on: A claim carries fields outside its declared claim_type (e.g. identity-typed claim carrying authority-layer delegation).
A child scope expands a parent scope — violates monotonic narrowing; effective scope is the greatest lower bound of the chain.
Delegation chain depth exceeds the declared maximum.
Well-typed claims at each layer cannot be combined under the layer's composition rule (e.g. disjoint authority scopes).

continuity.triggers_on: Rotation-attestation chain has a gap — a kid transition is unaccounted for in the history.
session_epoch in the claim does not match the resolved epoch.
Sequence number out of order in the rotation/continuity record.

correlation.triggers_on: The same action_ref + subject + (claim_type, evidenceType) is bound to more than one issuer with disjoint verdicts — non-injective discrimination tuple. See action-ref-near-miss-vectors.json.
Presented scope is not bound by the embedded action_ref; recomputing action_ref over the presented tuple diverges from the embedded value.
action_type or a field's semantics differ between issuance and verification, yielding divergent action_refs for one logical action.
